name: Body Care Basket
recipeInstructions:
1. Gather all the items listed in the ingredients section.
2. Place bath salts in the bathtub for a relaxing soak.
3. Apply all-natural lotion to moisturize your skin after bathing.
4. Use shampoo and cream rinse/conditioner for hair care before bedtime.
5. Light candles and use aromatherapy oils for ambiance during relaxation time.
6. Prepare a cup of relaxing herbal tea while unwinding.
7. Enjoy the candies as a sweet treat during or after your bath and skincare routine.
